steps.title: Use the performance context
steps.content: The narrator says Pheus truly shines when he is in front of an audience and becomes a heightened version of himself. In context, the word means genuinely or in reality.

steps.title: Eliminate opposite meanings
steps.content: Choice A means only slightly, which conflicts with the heightened performance. Choice B means barely, the opposite of the intended meaning. Choice D means rudely, which is unrelated to Pheus's performance. The answer is C.
